title: Moss And Rice Mockup Board AI
sourceTitle: Moss And Rice Mockup Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable packaging proposal board with brand packaging proposal board with product mockups, material samples, label zones, and structured presentation layout. clean brand packaging proposal board. large mockups and material swatches. few readable section labels. premium botanical packaging system Product Line: premium herbal snack gift set. Fictional Brand: MOSS & RICE. Package Forms: stand-up pouch, rigid gift box, bottle label, and shopping bag mockup. Design System: botanical illustration, small seal mark, single-language English label grid, and tactile paper texture. Display. Layout: clean proposal board with four large zones: hero mockup, series thumbnails, material swatches, and three detail closeups. Palette: moss green, warm rice paper, charcoal ink, and muted gold. Subject: Make premium herbal snack gift set the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: 4:3 「 」. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use a clean 4-zone proposal board: hero package mockup, product-line thumbnails, material/palette strip, and 3 detail closeups. Avoid dense micro-labels. Style and Rendering: Render in brand packaging proposal board visual finish preserving these source cues: packaging-system thinking, proposal-board layout, mockups plus annotations/material notes. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use moss green, warm rice paper, charcoal ink, and muted gold. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
